publicPresets.label: Switch Immersion Sweet
publicPresets.defaultUse: Sweet washed, honey, or easy daily cups.
publicPresets.defaultUseId: Washed manis, honey, atau seduhan harian yang lembut.
publicPresets.easiestMistake: Letting the closed phase run too long until the cup turns flat or muddy.
publicPresets.easiestMistakeId: Fase katup tertutup terlalu lama sampai rasa datar atau keruh.
publicPresets.whenNotToUse: Very delicate floral coffees with high-buffer water or doses that exceed safe closed load.
publicPresets.whenNotToUseId: Bean floral sangat delicate, air buffer tinggi, atau dosis melewati batas muatan tertutup.
publicPresets.why: Closed contact gives sweetness with low agitation, then the release cleans up the finish.
publicPresets.whyId: Kontak katup tertutup memberi sweetness dengan agitasi rendah, lalu buka katup membersihkan finish.
publicPresets.watch: Keep the slurry calm and open before the cup turns heavy.
publicPresets.watchId: Jaga slurry tetap tenang dan buka katup sebelum cangkir terasa berat.

publicPresets.label: Switch Immersion Heavy Body
publicPresets.defaultUse: Natural, wet-hulled, medium roast, or dense comfort cups.
publicPresets.defaultUseId: Natural, wet-hulled, medium roast, atau cangkir tebal dan nyaman.
publicPresets.easiestMistake: Too much closed load or agitation can make the cup muddy.
publicPresets.easiestMistakeId: Muatan tertutup atau agitasi berlebih bisa membuat cangkir keruh.
publicPresets.whenNotToUse: Small Switch 02 doses above 12 g, fragile floral coffees, or already-heavy water.
publicPresets.whenNotToUseId: Switch 02 dengan dosis besar, bean floral rapuh, atau air yang sudah terasa berat.
publicPresets.why: Longer closed contact and quiet release build body without changing dose or ratio first.
publicPresets.whyId: Kontak tertutup lebih panjang dan buka katup tenang membangun body tanpa langsung mengubah dosis atau rasio.
publicPresets.watch: Stop chasing body once the finish starts to dry or the bed gets silty.
publicPresets.watchId: Berhenti mengejar body jika finish mulai kering atau bed terasa berlumpur.

publicPresets.label: Switch Hybrid Balanced
publicPresets.defaultUse: The safest all-round Switch default for most coffees.
publicPresets.defaultUseId: Default Switch paling aman untuk mayoritas kopi.
publicPresets.cupShape: Sweet and clean with controlled body.
publicPresets.cupShapeId: Manis dan bersih dengan body terkendali.
publicPresets.easiestMistake: Closing too much water on Switch 02 instead of using a hybrid open-fill.
publicPresets.easiestMistakeId: Menahan terlalu banyak air di Switch 02, padahal lebih aman memakai hybrid dengan fase terbuka.
publicPresets.whenNotToUse: Use V60 Mode for maximum transparency or Heavy Body for intentionally dense cups.
publicPresets.whenNotToUseId: Pakai Mode V60 untuk transparansi maksimal atau Body untuk cangkir yang sengaja lebih tebal.
publicPresets.why: A small controlled closed phase gives sweetness while open phases keep the finish clean.
publicPresets.whyId: Fase katup tertutup yang kecil dan terkontrol memberi sweetness, lalu fase terbuka menjaga finish bersih.
publicPresets.watch: Watch chamber load on 02; release before the bed feels stalled.
publicPresets.watchId: Pantau muatan ruang di Switch 02; buka katup sebelum bed terasa macet.

publicPresets.label: Switch Hybrid Bright Clean
publicPresets.defaultUse: Washed, floral, bright, or fruit-definition targets.
publicPresets.defaultUseId: Washed, floral, cerah, atau target buah yang ingin lebih jelas.
publicPresets.cupShapeId: Transparan, cerah, bersih, dan buah lebih terbaca.
publicPresets.easiestMistake: Too much agitation or high-buffer water can mute the floral finish.
publicPresets.easiestMistakeId: Agitasi berlebih atau air buffer tinggi bisa meredam finish floral.
publicPresets.whenNotToUse: Very dark roasts or users who want a thick comfort cup.
publicPresets.whenNotToUseId: Sangrai sangat gelap atau ketika kamu ingin cangkir yang tebal dan nyaman.
safeSizeCompatibility: MUGEN x SWITCH: use lower agitation
publicPresets.why: Open early flow keeps fines moving cleanly; a short capture phase adds sweetness without hiding acidity.
publicPresets.whyId: Aliran terbuka lebih awal menjaga fines bergerak bersih; capture singkat menambah sweetness tanpa menutup acidity.
publicPresets.watch: Protect florals with low agitation and release before the cup gets heavy.
publicPresets.watchId: Lindungi floral dengan agitasi rendah dan buka katup sebelum cangkir terasa berat.

publicPresets.label: Switch V60 Mode
publicPresets.defaultUse: Switch used open as a clean percolation brewer.
publicPresets.defaultUseId: Switch dipakai dengan katup terbuka sebagai brewer perkolasi yang bersih.
publicPresets.cupShapeId: Bersih, transparan, mirip V60, tetapi lebih sensitif.
publicPresets.easiestMistake: Assuming the plan has immersion when the valve is intentionally open.
publicPresets.easiestMistakeId: Mengira ada immersion, padahal katup memang terbuka dari awal.
publicPresets.whenNotToUse: When the coffee needs more contact time or users want easy sweetness.
publicPresets.whenNotToUseId: Saat kopi butuh kontak lebih panjang atau kamu ingin sweetness yang lebih mudah.
publicPresets.why: The valve stays open, so the Switch behaves like a percolation brewer rather than an immersion dripper.
publicPresets.whyId: Katup tetap terbuka, jadi Switch bekerja seperti brewer perkolasi, bukan immersion.
publicPresets.watch: Flow and grind matter more because the recipe is less forgiving.
publicPresets.watchId: Flow dan gilingan lebih menentukan karena metode ini lebih sensitif.

publicPresets.label: Switch Iced Hybrid
publicPresets.defaultUse: Japanese iced Switch with explicit hot-water and ice split.
publicPresets.defaultUseId: Switch es gaya Jepang dengan split air panas dan es yang jelas.
publicPresets.cupShape: Fresh, bright, clear, with preserved sweetness.
publicPresets.cupShapeId: Segar, cerah, jernih, dengan sweetness tetap terjaga.
publicPresets.easiestMistake: Adding hidden bypass water after brewing instead of respecting the hot/ice split.
publicPresets.easiestMistakeId: Menambah bypass air tersembunyi setelah seduh, bukan mengikuti split air panas/es.
publicPresets.whenNotToUse: When no ice is available or the chamber load exceeds safe closed capacity.
publicPresets.whenNotToUseId: Saat tidak ada es atau muatan ruang melewati batas aman katup tertutup.
safeSizeCompatibility: MUGEN x SWITCH: smaller iced hybrid
publicPresets.why: A controlled hot concentrate extracts sweetness before the brew releases directly onto ice.
publicPresets.whyId: Konsentrat panas yang terkontrol mengekstrak sweetness sebelum kopi turun langsung ke es.
publicPresets.watch: Use only the planned hot water; do not add hidden bypass after brewing.
publicPresets.watchId: Pakai hanya air panas yang direncanakan; jangan tambah bypass tersembunyi setelah seduh.

publicPresets.label: MUGEN x SWITCH Everyday Hybrid
publicPresets.defaultUse: MUGEN x SWITCH everyday low-bypass hybrid.
publicPresets.defaultUseId: MUGEN x SWITCH hybrid harian dengan bypass rendah.
publicPresets.cupShape: Sweet, focused, low-bypass, with a clean release.
publicPresets.cupShapeId: Manis, fokus, bypass rendah, dengan buka katup yang bersih.
publicPresets.easiestMistake: Treating the MUGEN cone like Switch 03 and overloading the 200 ml chamber.
publicPresets.easiestMistakeId: Memperlakukan MUGEN seperti Switch 03 sampai ruang 200 ml kelebihan muatan.
publicPresets.whenNotToUse: Large 20 g full-immersion recipes or recipes needing Switch 03 chamber space.
publicPresets.whenNotToUseId: Resep full immersion 20 g atau resep yang membutuhkan ruang seperti Switch 03.
safeSizeCompatibility: MUGEN x SWITCH: 10-12 g immersion, 15-18 g hybrid
publicPresets.why: The MUGEN cone lowers bypass, so the hybrid path keeps contact controlled without pretending it is a Switch 03.
publicPresets.whyId: Cone MUGEN menurunkan bypass, jadi jalur hybrid menjaga kontak tetap terkendali tanpa menyamakan kapasitasnya dengan Switch 03.
publicPresets.watch: Keep chamber load under 180 ml and use lower agitation than a classic V60.
publicPresets.watchId: Jaga muatan ruang di bawah 180 ml dan pakai agitasi lebih rendah daripada V60 klasik.

internalProgrammes.label: Full immersion sweet
internalProgrammes.stepIntent: Charge closed, hold quietly, release cleanly.

internalProgrammes.label: Full immersion heavy body
internalProgrammes.stepIntent: Longer closed contact for syrupy body, with muddy-risk guardrails.

internalProgrammes.label: Bloom then immersion
internalProgrammes.stepIntent: Closed bloom or capture, then safe fill and release.

internalProgrammes.label: Immersion then percolation
internalProgrammes.stepIntent: Build sweetness closed, finish open for cleanliness.

internalProgrammes.label: Percolation then immersion
internalProgrammes.stepIntent: Open early clarity, short capture, then release.

internalProgrammes.label: Full percolation V60 mode
internalProgrammes.stepIntent: Valve stays open and the Switch behaves like a percolation dripper.

internalProgrammes.label: Temperature shift hybrid
internalProgrammes.stepIntent: Use staged temperature intent without claiming copied official recipe status.

internalProgrammes.label: Iced hybrid
internalProgrammes.stepIntent: Closed hot concentrate released over ice with no hidden bypass.

internalProgrammes.label: Competition hybrid
internalProgrammes.stepIntent: Advanced curated pattern inspired by official champion examples, not copied as an official recipe.
